metrics.name: trend
metrics.interpretation: Recent trajectory is positive or stable.

metrics.name: stability
metrics.interpretation: Score behavior is stable enough for higher-confidence recommendations.

metrics.name: sample_size
metrics.interpretation: Enough history to start model calibration seriously.

strengths: Short-horizon score forecasting is becoming tractable.
History depth is sufficient to begin recommendation grading and regime detection.
recommendations: Log prediction outcomes and recommendation acceptance on every scoring run.
Demote certainty automatically when stability and sample size are weak.
Track strategy-level hit rates, not just raw score accuracy.
